entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The target crop for the development of the single seed sampling strategy.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses molecular markers to select for desirable traits.

entities.name: SINGLE-SEED-DESCENT
entities.description: A method for rapid line fixation to increase the frequency of desirable alleles.

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a breeding population over time.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by multiple genes that are targets for genetic gain.

entities.name: BREEDING CYCLE
entities.description: The time required to develop a new crop variety.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism.

entities.name: SEED-CHIPPING
entities.description: An automatable seed sampling protocol used in various species.

entities.name: LEAF-BASED SAMPLING
entities.description: The traditional protocol of sampling genetic material from leaf tissue.

entities.name: SINGLE SEED SAMPLING STRATEGY
entities.description: A cost-effective and efficient strategy for sampling a single seed for genotyping in rice.

entities.name: DNA
entities.description: Genetic material extracted from seeds or leaves for marker analysis.

entities.name: PCR TRAIT-MARKERS
entities.description: Markers used in PCR to identify specific traits during selection.

entities.name: FIXED LINES
entities.description: Homozygous lines, such as F6, used in breeding programs.

entities.name: SNP CALL RATES
entities.description: The percentage of single nucleotide polymorphisms successfully identified in a sample.

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: Techniques used to speed up the progression of breeding generations.

entities.name: PARENTAL SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting the best parents for crossing in a breeding program.

entities.name: VARIETAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The overall process of creating and releasing a new crop variety.
